Class ScoreboardService

java.lang.Object
net.sylphian.minecraft.scoreboard.ScoreboardService
public class ScoreboardService extends Object
Core service for Sylphian-Scoreboard.

Owns the per-player scoreboard map and manages the full lifecycle — initialization, player join/quit handling, and the periodic refresh task. All scoreboard interactions from other plugins go through the sub-services SidebarService and NametagService, which reach per-player scoreboards via getScoreboard(UUID).

    static void

    Immediately refreshes the sidebar for a single player.
    static void
    refreshAll()
    Called by the periodic refresh task at the configured update interval.
    static void
    shutdown()
    Shuts down the service — cancels the refresh task, restores all players to the main scoreboard, and clears all state in both sub-services.

  • Method Details

    • init

      public static void init(org.bukkit.plugin.java.JavaPlugin plugin, ScoreboardConfig config)
      Configures sub-services and starts the periodic refresh task. Assigns scoreboards to any already-online players immediately. Must be called before players can join.
      Parameters:
      plugin - the plugin instance used for scheduling
      config - the parsed scoreboard configuration

    • shutdown

      public static void shutdown()
      Shuts down the service — cancels the refresh task, restores all players to the main scoreboard, and clears all state in both sub-services.

    • onJoin

      public static void onJoin(org.bukkit.entity.Player player)
      Creates and assigns a fresh scoreboard for a joining player. Applies all existing sidebar and nametag state immediately.
      Parameters:
      player - the joining player

    • onQuit

      public static void onQuit(org.bukkit.entity.Player player)
      Removes the player's scoreboard on quit.
      Parameters:
      player - the quitting player

    • refresh

      public static void refresh(org.bukkit.entity.Player player)
      Immediately refreshes the sidebar for a single player.
      Parameters:
      player - the player to refresh

    • refreshAll

      public static void refreshAll()
      Called by the periodic refresh task at the configured update interval.

    • getScoreboard

      public static org.bukkit.scoreboard.Scoreboard getScoreboard(UUID uuid)
      Returns the managed scoreboard for the given player UUID. Used by sub-services to reach player scoreboards — not intended for external plugins.
      Parameters:
      uuid - the player UUID
      Returns:
      the scoreboard, or null if the player is not tracked
